name: Ramz Lattafa Silver
description: A captivating oriental fragrance with a blend of sweet, spicy, and woody notes, perfect for evening wear.

name: Ramz Lattafa Gold
description: A luxurious and warm fragrance featuring rich amber, sweet fruits, and soft floral notes for an elegant presence.

name: Vulcan Feu
description: An explosive and passionate fragrance with fiery spices, deep woods, and a hint of smoky leather.

name: Azzaro The Most Wanted
description: An intense and highly addictive fragrance for men, blending vibrant cardamom, irresistible toffee, and masculine amber wood.

name: Afnan 9 PM
description: Afnan 9 PM is a dynamic and energetic fragrance perfect for evening wear. It opens with fresh fruity notes and settles into a warm, sweet, and spicy base of vanilla and amber.

name: Mystère Boisé
description: An enigmatic woody chypre with moss-covered forest floor, labdanum resin, and a surprising flicker of smoked incense. Deeply complex and long-lasting.

name: Fleur de Cassis
description: Blackcurrant buds and magnolia petals over a luminous white musk base. A modern floral that is both playful and refined.

name: Amber Soleil
description: Golden amber fused with sun-warmed skin, benzoin, and a whisper of orange blossom. Radiant, sensual, and utterly irresistible.

name: Velvet Rose Lip Elixir
description: A luxurious tinted lip treatment that blends sheer rose pigment with hyaluronic acid and rosehip oil. Delivers colour and lasting nourishment in a single stroke.

name: Lumière Éclat Serum
description: A concentrated brightening serum with 15% Vitamin C, niacinamide, and ferulic acid. Visibly evens skin tone and restores radiance within four weeks.

name: Nude Velvet Foundation
description: Buildable medium-to-full coverage with a skin-like velvet finish. Infused with hyaluronic acid for 16-hour hydration and a flawless, luminous complexion.

name: Rosé Glow Blush Palette
description: Five rose-toned blush and highlight shades ranging from barely-there nude to deep coral. Silky-milled formula glides on and blends effortlessly for a garden-fresh flush.

name: Midnight Lash Mascara
description: Volumising, lengthening, and conditioning in one. The precision-curved brush deposits deep black pigment from root to tip, while provitamin B5 nourishes lashes overnight.

name: Golden Hour Eye Palette
description: Eight editorial eye shades — from champagne satin to smoked mahogany — inspired by the hour when daylight turns to gold. Intensely pigmented, crease-resistant.

name: Satin Skin Hydra-Mist
description: A weightless hydrating mist packed with rose water, aloe vera, and glycerin. Instantly quenches dehydrated skin mid-day and sets makeup for a dewy, fresh finish.

name: Velvet Oud Decant
description: Experience the full depth of Velvet Oud in a 5ml travel vial. Smoky oud, dark rose, and warm amber — perfect for sampling before committing to a full bottle.

name: Blanc Iris Decant
description: A 5ml sample of the powdery elegance of Blanc Iris — Florentine iris root, white peony, and cashmere musk in a sleek travel vial.

name: Rose Noire Decant
description: Dare the darkness in a 5ml vial. Turkish rose absolute intertwines with black patchouli and vetiver. A sample made for the bold and unapologetic.

name: Santal Lumière Decant
description: 5ml of creamy Mysore sandalwood, vanilla bourbon, and smoked cardamom. The ultimate comfort fragrance in a pocket-sized vial.

name: Aqua Neroli Decant
description: Sun-drenched neroli and Sicilian bergamot in a 5ml travel size. Light and uplifting — ideal for everyday wear and travel.

name: Mystère Boisé Decant
description: The enigmatic woody chypre in a 5ml vial — oakmoss, labdanum, and smoked incense. A rare chance to sample this limited edition.

name: Fleur de Cassis Decant
description: Playful and refined — blackcurrant buds and magnolia in a 5ml sample vial. A modern floral that never overstays its welcome.

name: Amber Soleil Decant
description: Golden amber, benzoin, and sun-warmed skin in a 5ml vial. Radiant and sensual — experience the full glory of Amber Soleil before purchasing.
